scripts.dev: concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,green "PORT=3001 pnpm --filter api dev" "PORT=3000 pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.dev:fresh: pkill -f 'nest.js start' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'concurrently' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.7 && pnpm dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @aw-finanzas/database build && pnpm --filter @aw-finanzas/shared build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
